◎简　　介  

　　Determined to get sweet revenge, the once model mother devises a unique and fascinating scheme. Using legal loopholes, she methodically creates a totally new identity - a sultry barfly who will be the perfect bait for her attacker. But she soon discovers the thin line which separates her real life from her fantasy personality is slowly being erased.
